MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ZHI WHU, HUI WU, YAN WU, YU WU'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Jonathan Joiner of the Law Offices of Richard Hurlburt (391.6496) for plaintiff and responding party; Jonathan Bornstein of Bornstein & Bornstein (409.7611) for defendants and moving parties. Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

**********************************************************

After hearing the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $2,850.00 is granted. Plaintiff's order signed and both counsel notified by phone.
